refund_policy.policy_text: Refunds for new users who cancel within 14 days of original payment transaction. Conditions: must be first-time purchaser, must have purchased directly from customer service.
refund_policy.residential_refund: 14-day for new users via customer service
refund_policy.isp_refund: 14-day for new users via customer service

notes: Small niche provider. Limited public data. No Trustpilot presence found. Refund restricted to new users via customer service. Low information availability is itself a risk signal.
